# Paweł Mamcarz — Procurement Expert & SAP Ariba

> Associate Partner CEE at apsolut Group (part of All for One Group SE). 25+ years in strategic procurement, SAP Ariba, and digital transformation for 100+ organizations across Central and Eastern Europe.

## About

Paweł Mamcarz is a procurement transformation expert based in Warsaw, Poland. He builds the CEE region for apsolut Group — a SAP Gold Partner and multiple-time SAP Ariba MEE Partner of the Year. His portfolio spans 20+ SAP Ariba implementations across Poland, Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, and Romania for clients including KGHM, Żabka Polska, PLL LOT, Motor Oil Hellas, and MOL.

Before joining apsolut, he held senior roles at SAP Polska (SAP Ariba Senior Account Executive), PZU (Strategic Project Director), PwC (Vice Director, Advisory), PKP PLK (Board Advisor), PKP Intercity (Program Director), and PKN ORLEN (Procurement Department Head, CONNECT Platform Project Manager).

He managed a 500M PLN/year procurement portfolio at PKN ORLEN and led the CONNECT sourcing platform — the largest of its kind in Poland (15 companies, 4 countries, 60-person team).

Education: SGH Warsaw (Finance & Banking), WU Wien (CEMS Master), Warsaw Executive MBA (Univ. of Minnesota / SGH), APMP (PMI).

Languages: Polish (native), English (fluent), German (advanced), Russian (communicative).

## Services

- **SAP Ariba Implementation**: End-to-end deployment of SAP Ariba (Sourcing, Contracts, Buying, SLP, Supplier Risk), SAP Fieldglass, and SAP S/4HANA Procurement across CEE
- **Procurement Transformation**: Maturity assessment, Target Operating Model design, category strategies, spend analytics, process redesign, change management
- **Public Procurement Advisory (PZP)**: Expert advisory for large public sector tenders (100M+ PLN), framework agreement negotiation, e-procurement platform audit

## Key Projects

- **ORLEN CONNECT**: Sourcing platform for 15 companies in 4 countries, 60-person team, SAP SRM/MM + Oracle EBS
- **Żabka Polska**: SAP Ariba Buying & Supplier Risk for 12,000+ store convenience chain
- **KGHM**: SAP Ariba + Fieldglass + S/4HANA integration for top 3 global copper producer
- **PLL LOT**: SAP Ariba implementation for Poland's national airline
- **Motor Oil Hellas**: SAP Ariba for Greek energy sector

## PL

Paweł Mamcarz — ekspert zakupowy, konsultant ds. wdrożeń systemów zakupowych (SAP Ariba, Fieldglass, S/4HANA). Associate Partner CEE w apsolut Group / All for One Group. 25+ lat w zakupach strategicznych, transformacji zakupów i zamówieniach publicznych (PZP). Ponad 100 organizacji w portfolio — PKN Orlen, KGHM, Żabka, LOT, PGE, PZU, MOL, Motor Oil Hellas. Konsulting zakupowy, doradztwo zakupowe, audyt zakupów, platforma zakupowa, e-procurement.
